rationale: issue-size-review judges decomposability (structure); outcome_confidence judges autonomous-implementation risk. An unconditional reroute to implement_current on a keep-as-one verdict would delete the outcome gate for the highest-risk class of issue. The two-step policy earns the gate pass via correct Pattern-B scoring or defers honestly with a per-issue outcome_gate_waived escalation valve.
rule: Two-step earn-the-pass / honest-deferral policy (already adopted; no unconditional reroute or run-scoped bypass flag)
alternatives_rejected: Unconditional reroute of the guard-2 keep-as-one verdict straight to implement_current, gated by a run-scoped --context skip_keep_as_one_reroute escape flag
